'''√y-ch-k''' ('''yachaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:penectomize|penectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:penectomize|penectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √y-ch-k
|-
! Lemma
| yachaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachakithi|yachakithi]] || [[word:yachakiji|yachakiji]] || [[word:yachakishi|yachakishi]] || [[word:yachaki|yachaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachakuthuth|yachakuthuth]] || [[word:yachakujuj|yachakujuj]] || [[word:yachakushush|yachakushush]] || [[word:yachak|yachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachakuthu|yachakuthu]] || [[word:yachakuju|yachakuju]] || [[word:yachakushu|yachakushu]] || [[word:yachaku|yachaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachakufuth|yachakufuth]] || [[word:yachakufuj|yachakufuj]] || [[word:yachakufush|yachakufush]] || [[word:yachakuf|yachakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachakethe|yachakethe]] || [[word:yachakeje|yachakeje]] || [[word:yachakeshe|yachakeshe]] || [[word:yachake|yachake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachakothoth|yachakothoth]] || [[word:yachakojoj|yachakojoj]] || [[word:yachakoshosh|yachakoshosh]] || [[word:yachak|yachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachakotho|yachakotho]] || [[word:yachakojo|yachakojo]] || [[word:yachakosho|yachakosho]] || [[word:yachako|yachako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachakofoth|yachakofoth]] || [[word:yachakofoj|yachakofoj]] || [[word:yachakofosh|yachakofosh]] || [[word:yachakof|yachakof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachakïfïf|yachakïfïf]] || [[word:yachakïfïf|yachakïfïf]] || [[word:yachakïfïf|yachakïfïf]] || [[word:yachakïfïf|yachakïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]] || [[word:yachakïf|yachakïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachakæthæ|yachakæthæ]] || [[word:yachakæjæ|yachakæjæ]] || [[word:yachakæshæ|yachakæshæ]] || [[word:yachakæ|yachakæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachakathath|yachakathath]] || [[word:yachakajaj|yachakajaj]] || [[word:yachakashash|yachakashash]] || [[word:yachak|yachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachakatha|yachakatha]] || [[word:yachakaja|yachakaja]] || [[word:yachakasha|yachakasha]] || [[word:yachaka|yachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachakafath|yachakafath]] || [[word:yachakafaj|yachakafaj]] || [[word:yachakafash|yachakafash]] || [[word:yachakaf|yachakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yachakasha|yachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyachakasha|goyachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyachakasha|gokiyachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yachaknüsha|yachaknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyachaknknüsha|goyachaknknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachaknüsha|gokiyachaknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yachakshësha|yachakshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyachaknkshësha|goyachaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyachakshësha|gokiyachakshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachakrosha|yachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachaknkrosha|goyachaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachakrosha|gokiyachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yachakmusha|yachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachaknkmusha|goyachaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachakmusha|gokiyachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yachaksherasha|yachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyachaknksherasha|goyachaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyachaksherasha|gokiyachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yachakngasha|yachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyachaknkngasha|goyachaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyachakngasha|gokiyachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yachakyasha|yachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyachaknkyasha|goyachaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyachakyasha|gokiyachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yachakyamasha|yachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyachaknkyamasha|goyachaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyachakyamasha|gokiyachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachaknüshësha|yachaknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachaknknüshësha|goyachaknknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachaknüshësha|gokiyachaknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachaknürosha|yachaknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachaknknürosha|goyachaknknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachaknürosha|gokiyachaknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachaknümusha|yachaknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachaknknümusha|goyachaknknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachaknümusha|gokiyachaknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachakshënüsha|yachakshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachaknkshënüsha|goyachaknkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachakshënüsha|gokiyachakshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachakshërosha|yachakshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachaknkshërosha|goyachaknkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachakshërosha|gokiyachakshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachakshëmusha|yachakshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachaknkshëmusha|goyachaknkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachakshëmusha|gokiyachakshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachakronüsha|yachakronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachaknkronüsha|goyachaknkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachakronüsha|gokiyachakronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachakroshësha|yachakroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachaknkroshësha|goyachaknkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachakroshësha|gokiyachakroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachakromusha|yachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachaknkromusha|goyachaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachakromusha|gokiyachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachakmunüsha|yachakmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachaknkmunüsha|goyachaknkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachakmunüsha|gokiyachakmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachakmushësha|yachakmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachaknkmushësha|goyachaknkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachakmushësha|gokiyachakmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachakmurosha|yachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachaknkmurosha|goyachaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachakmurosha|gokiyachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yachak|yachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yæchæk|yæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyachak|hoyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyæchæk|hoyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyachak|hohoyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyæchæk|hohoyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüyachak|nüyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüyæchæk|nüyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüyachak|nünüyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüyæchæk|nünüyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïyachak|nïyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïyæchæk|nïyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïyachak|nïnïyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïyæchæk|nïnïyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyachak|luyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyæchæk|luyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyachak|luluyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyæchæk|luluyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyachak|liyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyæchæk|liyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyachak|liliyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyæchæk|liliyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyachak|koyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyæchæk|koyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyachak|kokoyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyæchæk|kokoyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyachak|keyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyæchæk|keyæchæk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyachak|kekeyachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyæchæk|kekeyæchæk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
